crop_xywh.note: Siril crop's y-origin is the OPPOSITE end from numpy's FITS row order (y_siril = H - y_np - h). The coverage-stat verification (crop the MAP with the same args, require Min >= threshold*1000) is now part of the procedure - never export a box to Siril unverified.
